hero.headline: Your driveway — *done right* the first time
hero.subheadline: Owner on-site for every job. No shortcuts, no surprises.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Asphalt that holds up
services_section.subheading: From tear-out to final roll, we handle every step

services.title: New Driveway Installation
services.description: Complete tear-out and fresh asphalt. Proper base prep means it lasts decades.

services.title: Driveway Repair
services.description: Cracks, potholes, and edge damage fixed right. No Band-Aid solutions.

services.title: Sealcoating
services.description: Protective coating that keeps weather and wear from breaking down your asphalt.

services.title: Parking Lot Paving
services.description: Commercial lots built to handle heavy traffic and last for years.

about.heading: Family business, generational knowledge
about.body: We're a Bowling Green paving team with decades of combined experience. Owner stays on-site for every job.

reviews.name: Chad S.
reviews.text: 10/10 on the entire process. Owner showed up for estimate and stayed on location the entire time. Lifetime industry experience shows — he knew exactly what he was doing.

reviews.name: Sandi C.
reviews.text: Got to work immediately, worked as a seamless team, finished within timeframe. Took excellent care of our property and did amazing work.

reviews.name: James C.
reviews.text: Local, family owned business delivered fair pricing and high quality work. Impressed by all the little touches they did right. Highly recommend.

cta.heading: Ready for a driveway that lasts?
cta.body: Free estimates. Owner meets you personally. Work starts when we say it will.
